title: verbascum aureiforme
intro: Verbascum aureiforme, also known as yellow-flowered mullein, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mullein family (Scrophulariaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it a popular remedy for respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Verbascum aureiforme include soothing coughs, relieving skin irritations, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Verbascum aureiforme include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
